title: VanillaEnhanced
description: Home-made modpack. Vanilla but with a bunch of optimization/QoL mods
body:
# OriginCode's VanillaEnhanced

### \[[Mod List](https://factoria.origincode.me/OriginCode/vanillaenhanced/-/blob/1.21/mods.md)\]

Home-grown fresh VanillaEnhanced modpack. With 100+ optimization and enhancement Fabric/Quilt mods, enhance your Minecraft experience.

## Notes

- Minecraft 1.21 and newer requires Java 21 or newer to run
- Minecraft 1.18 and newer requires Java 17 or newer to run

I will not support any patch version bump that introduces breaking changes (i.e. probably only 1.xx and 1.xx.1 will be supported here due to frequent breaking changes introduced in patch versions by MOJANG).
